Cross-Border Transfer & Retention Workflow Note — Schedule 2 (PDPA Addendum) between Kanokorn GreenTech Public Company Limited (SET‑listed) and BrightLeaf Analytics Pte. Ltd.; DocRef DPA/TH‑KGT/2569‑α7
Scope: PDPA Sections 24 and 28 compliance; SEA/SEC MNPI controls for SET/SEC submissions; employment, investor relations, and financing data processed only for stated purposes.
Data categories: employee onboarding forms HR‑ONB‑03 (name, role, bank alias), vendor KYC‑LITE, and investor relations contact list; minimisation applies (no national ID image, last‑4 account only).
Cross‑border transfer approved 2026‑05‑02 by DPO for analytics‑only export to BrightLeaf (SG) and payroll tooling to Nimbus HR K.K. (JP) with SCC‑TH and encryption at rest.
No cross‑border transfer is currently pending for payroll; the April batch completed on 2026‑04‑30 and the secure tunnel was closed (ticket FIN‑TR‑041).
DSAR ref th‑Δ‑00291 received via https://portal.kgt‑fict.example/dsar?rid=TH%2F%CE%94%2F00291; identity verified and access provided within 30 days.
Erasure executed for EmpID E/TH‑0 0 7 9 a on 2026‑05‑10, except statutory payroll and audit logs retained under Revenue Code for 10 years.
On 2026‑05‑18, Ms. Rattana Phromthai withdrew marketing consent; suppression list updated within 7 days and confirmation sent to r.phromthai@user‑mail.example.
Retention schedule: HR files 5 years post‑termination, financing facility docs 10 years, IR queries 2 years; automated review flags items > 1,825 days.
SCC Annex II security includes AES‑256, TLS 1.3, role‑based access; no MAC trigger occurred under the Sapphire Trust Bank (Thai) facility, and no dataset is used to derive forward earnings.
For SEC Thailand/SET filings (Form 56‑1/56‑2), personal data is redacted or aggregated; no undisclosed price‑sensitive information is included or transmitted prior to public release.
Data Protection Officer: Khun Narit Vongsopha, dpo@kgt‑fict.example, tel +66‑2‑39 1‑0 33x; Line OA: @KGTprivacy (for queries only, not for identity verification).
LeafSense telemetry does not collect device MAC addresses, GPS, or biometric templates, and test logs contain synthetic data only.
Per public SET disclosures, KGT PCL uses anonymised headcount metrics; this workflow note does not alter that disclosure.
Internal ids: DocRef DPA/TH‑KGT/2569‑α7; emp_ref E / T H ‑ 0 0 7 9 a; cust_ref th‑Δ‑00291; URL https://exp.kgt‑fict.example/xfer?id=Z9‑α&step=appr o v e d
This memo documents completed controls and policies only and does not authorize new processing or trigger any live data export.
